title: T-045 — Inventory value RBAC server-side gating
prompt:
# T-045 — Inventory value RBAC server-side gating

PRD: `05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md` §14.5 (FR-WH-040), V-WH-DASH-001.
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`.

## Goal
Server function `getInventoryValueIfAllowed(session)` returns inventory value rows only when session.role IN ('Manager','Planner','Admin'); other roles get null/omit.

## Implementation contract
`apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/inventory-value-rbac.ts`. Pull session via auth; gate the value column server-side. Returns either {totalValueGbp, perWarehouse[]} or null. All inventory APIs (T-039, T-070 inventory browser) MUST call through this helper to avoid client-side leakage.

## Files (scope)
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/inventory-value-rbac.ts [create]
- apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/inventory-value-rbac.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given session.role='Manager', when called, then a {totalValueGbp, perWarehouse[]} object returns with non-null totals.
2. Given session.role='Operator', when called, then null returns and no SQL hits items.cost.
3. Given the helper is grepped for usages in inventory route handlers, when checked at lint time, then any direct SUM(qty*items.cost) outside this helper raises a CI lint warning.

## Test strategy
- RED: inventory-value-rbac.test.ts covers role gating + lint coverage.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test inventory-value-rbac`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not query items.cost without RBAC gate.
- Do not let role be passed from client.
- Do not bypass middleware-derived session.

pipeline_inputs.description: Server-side RBAC helper gating inventory value disclosure per V-WH-DASH-001.
pipeline_inputs.details: Single helper for all inventory consumers; ESLint rule prevents bypass.
acceptance_criteria: Given session.role='Manager', when called, then a {totalValueGbp, perWarehouse[]} object returns
Given session.role='Operator', when called, then null returns and items.cost is not queried
Given any direct SUM(qty*items.cost) outside this helper, when CI lints, then a warning raises
risk_red_lines: Do not query items.cost without gate
